title: Why did Elizabeth tell Nigel that she was going to the dentist?

meanings.usage: 常接动词-ing形式，表示避开做某事或避开某人
insist on doing something坚持做某事
prevent sb. from doing sth.阻止某人做某事
Fancy meeting you here!想不到在这儿遇见你！
wonder how/why/whether想知道如何/为什么/是否
go to the dentist's去看牙医
plenty of + 名词，意为“大量的”
wait for sb./sth.等待某人/某物
lie to sb.对某人说谎，过去式为lied
be busy doing sth.忙于做某事

examples.en: I crossed the street to avoid meeting him.
examples.zh: 我穿过街道以避免遇见他。

examples.en: You should avoid making the same mistake.
examples.zh: 你应该避免犯同样的错误。

examples.en: He saw me and came running towards me.
examples.zh: 他看见了我然后朝我跑过来。

examples.en: No matter how busy you are, he always insists on coming with you.
examples.zh: 无论你有多忙，他总是坚持要陪着你。

examples.en: No matter how hard I tried, I couldn't open the door.
examples.zh: 无论我多努力，我都打不开门。

phrases.phrase: think of a way of doing something

examples.en: I had to think of a way of preventing him from following me.
examples.zh: 我得想个办法阻止他跟着我。

examples.en: I tried to prevent him from following me around.
examples.zh: 我试图阻止他一直跟着我。

phrases.usage: 想不到在这儿遇见你！（表示惊讶）

examples.en: Fancy meeting you here! I thought you were in London.
examples.zh: 想不到在这儿遇见你！我以为你在伦敦呢。

phrases.phrase: Would you mind my coming with you?
phrases.usage: 你介意我和你一起去吗？（表示委婉请求）

examples.en: Would you mind my coming with you to the shops?
examples.zh: 你介意我和你一起去商店吗？

phrases.usage: 有很多可读的（有很多阅读材料）

examples.en: There's always plenty to read in the waiting room.
examples.zh: 候诊室里总有很多东西可读。

examples.en: There's plenty to see in this city.
examples.zh: 这座城市有很多可看的东西。

examples.en: He never has anything to do.
examples.zh: 他从来都没什么事可做。

examples.en: He asked, before I had finished speaking.
examples.zh: 他在我说完之前就问道。

grammar.title: 动名词（-ing形式）作宾语
grammar.definition: 某些动词后面需要接动名词（verb + -ing）作宾语，表示习惯性或一般性的动作
grammar.usage: 常与enjoy, avoid, finish, insist on, prevent...from, mind等动词连用

examples.en: I never enjoy meeting Nigel Dykes.
examples.zh: 我从来不喜欢遇到奈杰尔·戴克斯。

examples.en: He always insists on coming with you.
examples.zh: 他总是坚持要陪着你。

examples.en: prevent him from following me around
examples.zh: 阻止他一直跟着我

grammar.title: Would you mind + 物主代词/名词所有格 + doing?
grammar.definition: 用来委婉地询问或请求许可，询问对方是否介意自己做某事
grammar.structure: Would you mind my/nickname's + 动词-ing?
grammar.usage: 回答时常用Not at all（不介意）或I'm sorry, but...（介意）

examples.en: Would you mind my coming with you?
examples.zh: 你介意我和你一起去吗？

examples.en: Would you mind my opening the window?
examples.zh: 你介意我打开窗户吗？

grammar.title: No matter how + 形容词/副词 + 主语 + 谓语
grammar.definition: 无论多么...，不管怎样...，用来引导让步状语从句
grammar.structure: No matter how + adj./adv. + 主语 + 谓语
grammar.usage: 相当于However，用于强调无论条件如何变化，结果或情况不变

examples.en: No matter how busy you are, he always insists on coming with you.
examples.zh: 无论你有多忙，他总是坚持要陪着你。

examples.en: No matter how hard I tried, I couldn't convince him.
examples.zh: 无论我多努力，我都说服不了他。

sentencePatterns.pattern: I had to think of a way of + 动名词

original.en: I had to think of a way of preventing him from following me around all morning.
original.zh: 我得想个办法阻止他一整个上午都跟着我。

imitations.en: I had to think of a way of getting rid of him.
She had to think of a way of explaining her absence.
imitations.zh: 她得想个办法解释她的缺席。

sentencePatterns.pattern: No matter how + 形容词/副词 + 主语 + be动词/情态动词

original.en: No matter how busy you are, he always insists on coming with you.
original.zh: 无论你有多忙，他总是坚持要陪着你。

imitations.en: No matter how tired I am, I must finish my work.
imitations.zh: 无论我有多累，我必须完成工作。

imitations.en: No matter how cold it is, she goes running every morning.
imitations.zh: 无论天气多冷，她每天早上都去跑步。

sentencePatterns.pattern: Would you mind my + 动名词?

original.en: Would you mind my coming with you?
original.zh: 你介意我和你一起去吗？

imitations.en: Would you mind my sitting here?
Would you mind my using your phone?
imitations.zh: 你介意我用一下你的电话吗？

sentencePatterns.pattern: There's plenty to + 动词原形

original.en: There's always plenty to read in the waiting room!
original.zh: 候诊室里总有很多东西可读！

imitations.en: There's plenty to see in this museum.
imitations.zh: 这个博物馆有很多可看的。

imitations.en: There's plenty to do in London during the holiday.
imitations.zh: 假期里伦敦有很多可做的活动。
